title: What is a File?
drDigitalIntro:
Everything you keep on a computer is stored as a file.
• A photo is a file. A typed letter is a file. A song is a file.
• Each file has a name and holds one piece of your stuff.
• Let's open a few files and see what's inside.

playgroundTask.goal: Open two files to see what a file is

steps.say: Everything on a computer is stored as a file. Double-click GroceryList.txt to open it.
That file held a list of words. Files can hold pictures too — double-click VacationPhoto.png.

drDigitalSuccess: You opened two files! One held words, one held a picture. A file is just one saved piece of your stuff.
drDigitalHint: Double-click means click twice quickly on the same file. Look for the file that's glowing yellow.
